name: Chocolate Espresso Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 sticks unsalted butter or margarine, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa and espresso coffee until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. Beat eggs, butter, sugar, and extracts in another bowl until well blended.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredient mixture to the egg mixture, alternating with the coffee mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
5. Grease a 9-inch by 13-inch cake pan with butter or margarine and flour the bottom thoroughly.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes to one hour, until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
